title: Lens Flare
description: An anamorphic lens flare that locks onto the brightest point of a live image (smoothed so it glides) or a dragged position: hot core with chromatic fringe, the long cyan streak, a double halo ring, and a chain of polygonal ghosts spaced along the line through the frame centre — all additive, scaled by how bright the found light really is, with a subtle flicker. Works on a camera, a dropped photo/video, the demo, or the Mixer layers below. Intensity, streak, ghosts, halo, fringe, and threshold are live and audio-mappable (loudness surges the flare).
